name: Banana Split Bread
recipeIngredient: Reserve the juice from 1/3 cup Pineapple juice from the pineapple, heated
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except chocolate chips and cherries) into the inner pan in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and push "Start."
3. Add the chocolate chips and cherries when the Auto Bakery beeps, which is 88 minutes into the cycle (33 minutes with DAK Turbo II).
4. Enjoy this delightful bread fresh, chilled, or toasted. For an extra special treat, spread it with cream cheese blended with minced maraschinos and their liquid.
